summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing completed for Vivid H2O Solutions website. All backend APIs (17/17) and frontend functionality working perfectly. Website is fully functional with excellent user experience.
passed_tests: All 17 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Homepage loading with hero section, stats, featured products, testimonials
Products page with category filtering and search functionality
Product detail pages with specifications and inquiry forms
Services page displaying all 5 services with process workflow
About page with company timeline, values, and certifications
Contact page with working form submission and success notifications
Navigation between all pages working smoothly
Inquiry form submissions on both product detail and contact pages
Google Maps integration on contact page
